title: pen Records Request – Email Communications Ann Hanlon (Executive Director, Central DeKalb Perimeter Community Improvement District)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All emails sent or received by Police Chief Mike Carlson and/or Major Patrick Krieg in which Ann Hanlon (Executive Director, Central DeKalb Perimeter Community Improvement District) is a sender, recipient, or copied party, from January 1, 2026 through the date this request is processed.
Please include all attachments associated with any responsive emails.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

title: Disciplinary Records for Isaiah Pena and Preston Smith

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New Mexico Inspection of Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All disciplinary records for Isaiah Pena and Preston Smith of the Los Lunas Police Department.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 15 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Champ

communications.subject: Colorado Open Records Act Request: Revspring / UC Health
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Colorado Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Contracts and related amendments between RevSpring, Inc.  and UC Health 
Contracts and related amendments between Frazier Health Care Partners  and UC Health

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Tracie McMillan
